blocked_reason: All Google image/video generation APIs require paid plan. Free tier quota is 0 for image generation models.
still_prompt: Mystical scene with softly flickering candles, tarot cards spread on dark velvet table, wisps of incense smoke, warm amber lighting, shallow depth of field, cinematic mood, dark and mysterious
video_prompt: Slow cinematic movement, candle flames gently flickering, wisps of incense smoke drifting upward, subtle ambient light shifts, mystical atmosphere, seamless loop

api_errors.gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview: 429 RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED: quota limit 0 on free tier for gemini-3.1-flash-image
api_errors.imagen-4.0-generate-001: 400 INVALID_ARGUMENT: Imagen 3+ is only available on paid plans
api_errors.veo-3.1-generate-preview: 429 RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED: quota exhausted on free tier

notes: GEMINI_API_KEY is set and valid for text generation (Gemini 2.5 Flash works). But ALL image/video generation models (Gemini image, Imagen 4.0, Veo 2.0-3.1) require a paid Google AI plan. The free tier has a quota of 0 for these models. To test: upgrade to Google AI paid plan at https://ai.dev/projects. Veo 3.1 supports image-to-video, which is exactly what we need for hero video loops.
